text: Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You’re approved as event_helper. Glad to have you onboard—please check the event helper guide and community rules.
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You’re approved as mentor. Thanks for joining—please take a look at the mentor resources and community guidelines.
Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You’re approved as moderator. Please review the community guidelines and moderator handbook when you get a chance.
